(BMW MOA) is a [motorcycle club](/wiki/Motorcycle_club "Motorcycle club") for owners and admirers of [BMW motorcycles](/wiki/BMW_Motorrad "BMW Motorrad"). As of 2008[[update]](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=BMW_Motorcycle_Owners_of_America&action=edit), it had 39,700 members.[[1]](#cite_note-1)

Cutts, James H. (2008). ["BMW MOA Member and BMW Motorcycle Dealers - Who are these BMW riders and where did they get their bikes?"](https://mospace.umsystem.edu/xmlui/bitstream/handle/10355/460/Cutts%20poster.pdf?sequence=1) (PDF). University of Missouri-Columbia. Retrieved August 2, 2011.
*2009 BMW Owners Anonymous,* BMW Motorcycle Owners, Ellisville, Missouri, 2009, pp. 216-221
["All About the Rally"](https://rally.bmwmoa.org/all-about-the-rally/). BMW Motorcycle Owners of America. 2022. Retrieved December 19, 2022.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

(Redirected from [BMW MOA](/w/index.php?title=BMW_MOA&redirect=no "BMW MOA"))

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| [icon](/wiki/File:Question_book-new.svg) | This article **needs additional citations for [verification](/wiki/Wikipedia:Verifiability "Wikipedia:Verifiability")**. Please help [improve this article](/wiki/Special:EditPage/BMW_Motorcycle_Owners_of_America "Special:EditPage/BMW Motorcycle Owners of America") by [adding citations to reliable sources](/wiki/Help:Referencing_for_beginners "Help:Referencing for beginners"). Unsourced material may be challenged and removed. *Find sources:* ["BMW Motorcycle Owners of America"](https://www.google.com/search?as_eq=wikipedia&q=%22BMW+Motorcycle+Owners+of+America%22) – [news](https://www.google.com/search?tbm=nws&q=%22BMW+Motorcycle+Owners+of+America%22+-wikipedia&tbs=ar:1) **·** [newspapers](https://www.google.com/search?&q=%22BMW+Motorcycle+Owners+of+America%22&tbs=bkt:s&tbm=bks) **·** [books](https://www.google.com/search?tbs=bks:1&q=%22BMW+Motorcycle+Owners+of+America%22+-wikipedia) **·** [scholar](https://scholar.google.com/scholar?q=%22BMW+Motorcycle+Owners+of+America%22) **·** [JSTOR](https://www.jstor.org/action/doBasicSearch?Query=%22BMW+Motorcycle+Owners+of+America%22&acc=on&wc=on) *(May 2009)* *([Learn how and when to remove this message](/wiki/Help:Maintenance_template_removal "Help:Maintenance template removal"))* |

American motorcycle club

The **BMW Motorcycle Owners of America** (BMW MOA) is a [motorcycle club](/wiki/Motorcycle_club "Motorcycle club") for owners and admirers of [BMW motorcycles](/wiki/BMW_Motorrad "BMW Motorrad"). As of 2008[[update]](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=BMW_Motorcycle_Owners_of_America&action=edit), it had 39,700 members.[[1]](#cite_note-1)
BMW MOA was founded in 1972 in [Chicago](/wiki/Chicago "Chicago") by five enthusiasts.

The club is now based in Greer, South Carolina, and was formerly based in a suburb of St. Louis. It publishes a monthly magazine, *BMW Owners News* and an annual *Anonymous* book to assist touring riders in difficulty. Though founded in the United States, BMW MOA has members across the world.[[2]](#cite_note-2)
Since 1973 the club has held an annual rally in the United States and once in Canada.[[3]](#cite_note-3)
